_todo_csp: Uncomment the headers block below before going fully public. Replace https://api.nousflow.com with the actual backend URL.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://js.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.nousflow.com https://api.stripe.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
